basic_info.title: Castlevania
basic_info.review: A masterpiece of the NES era that defined the gothic action-platformer genre with its challenging gameplay and atmospheric design.

similar_games.title: Zelda II: The Adventure of Link

play_today.details: The most accessible modern version with all classic Castlevania games included. Features save states, rewind functionality, and online leaderboards.

recommended_patches.name: Anniversary Collection Update
recommended_patches.description: Official update adding online leaderboards and improved save functionality

play_today.details: NES emulation provides the most authentic experience. Best played with FCEUX or Nestopia emulator for accuracy.

recommended_patches.name: Control Enhancement Mod
recommended_patches.description: Improves jump mechanics and input responsiveness for modern controllers

recommended_patches.name: Graphics Overhaul Pack
recommended_patches.description: Enhanced sprite quality while preserving original art style

optimal_settings: CRT filter for authentic feel
60 FPS emulation
Enable save states
Touch controls customization
Save state slots enabled

play_today.details: Play the original cartridge version via emulation. Best for purists wanting authentic experience.

The definitive modern experience via the Castlevania Anniversary Collection on Steam. This version offers native widescreen support, controller remapping, and cloud saves. It includes the original NES gameplay with modern convenience features like save states and quick access, making it the most accessible way to play today without sacrificing the core experience.

recommended_patches.name: Castlevania Anniversary Collection Romhack Collection
recommended_patches.description: A curated collection of community patches for the Anniversary Collection that replaces internal ROMs with versions compatible with fan translations and quality-of-life fixes, specifically enabling the English Re-translation for Simon's Quest.

play_today.details: The authentic original experience for purists. While lacking modern conveniences, it offers the purest gameplay feel and original soundtrack. Best played via emulation on PC or mobile for save states and widescreen stretching. Requires a fan translation patch for full English text if playing the Japanese FDS version, but the North American NES cartridge is fully localized.

recommended_patches.name: Castlevania 30th Anniversary Edition
recommended_patches.description: A comprehensive overhaul that completely changes the game's graphics, including backgrounds, fonts, and item sprites, while fixing bugs and improving the overall visual presentation for the 30th anniversary.

recommended_patches.name: Castlevania: Improved Controls
recommended_patches.description: Enhances the original gameplay by refining movement physics, jump mechanics, and weapon handling to provide a smoother and more responsive experience without altering the core game balance.

recommended_patches.name: Castlevania 1 - Fortified Army
recommended_patches.description: A quality-of-life patch that adds a map overlay, fixes translation errors, and improves enemy placement to make the original NES experience more accessible for modern players.

recommended_patches.name: Castlevania II: Simon's Quest English Re-translation (+Map)
recommended_patches.description: Re-translates the notoriously poor English script of Simon's Quest into accurate English and adds a functional in-game map to assist with navigation, restoring the Japanese staff credits.

optimal_settings: Enable 'Stretch to Window' for widescreen aspect ratio
Set 'Audio Filter' to 'Original' for authentic sound
Enable 'Save States' for quick checkpointing
Enable 'Save States' for seamless progress saving
Map 'D-Pad' and 'A/B' buttons to touch screen corners
Set 'Screen Scaling' to 'Integer' for crisp pixel art

play_today.details: The original Japanese release on Famicom Disk System is technically the earliest version, featuring a slightly different soundtrack and minor graphical tweaks. However, it is locked to Japanese language with no official English localization. While historically significant, the language barrier and lack of modern accessibility make it a poor choice for most players today.

recommended_patches.name: Akumajou Densetsu - Localization And Title Screen Redone
recommended_patches.description: A fan translation patch that converts the original Japanese Famicom Disk System version of Castlevania III into English, including a redone title screen and accurate text localization.

optimal_settings: Enable 'Disk System' support in the BIOS settings to load .fds files
Set 'Video Mode' to 'NTSC' for correct color palette and timing
Enable 'Save States' to bypass the physical disk swapping requirement
Configure 'Input' to map D-Pad to keyboard arrows for precise movement
Enable 'Audio Resampling' to 48000Hz for cleaner sound output
Set 'Frame Skip' to 0 for maximum visual fidelity

play_today.details: The definitive modern experience via the Castlevania Anniversary Collection. Features native 1080p/4K resolution, widescreen support, and cloud saves. Includes the original NES version with modern quality-of-life features like save states and controller remapping. Official English localization ensures full accessibility without needing fan patches.

recommended_patches.name: Castlevania Anniversary Collection Romhack Collection
recommended_patches.description: A curated collection of community patches for the Anniversary Collection, including the 'English Re-translation (+Map)' for Simon's Quest and improved ROM compatibility for other titles within the collection's emulator.

play_today.details: A solid portable option with enhanced graphics and a new dungeon not found in the NES version. Features a rearranged soundtrack and improved visuals, though the screen is small. Best played via emulation on modern devices for better visibility and save states. Official English localization is included in all regions.

recommended_patches.name: Castlevania: Circle of the Moon Definitive Edition
recommended_patches.description: Unlocks all DSS modes (Magician, Fighter, Shooter, Thief) at the start, ensures all DSS cards drop on the first enemy kill, and restores the original Japanese difficulty and experience tables.

recommended_patches.name: Castlevania: Advanced Romhack Collection
recommended_patches.description: A compilation of three favorite romhacks for the Advance Collection, including control improvements and visual enhancements tailored for the GBA versions of the trilogy.

optimal_settings: Set 'Internal Resolution' to 4x for sharp scaling
Enable 'Sound Filter' for authentic audio emulation
Configure 'Save States' to auto-save every 5 minutes
Enable 'Save States' for quick checkpointing
Map 'D-Pad' to the left side of the touch screen
Set 'Screen Scaling' to 'Integer' to preserve pixel art

description.synopsis: In the year 1691, the vampire lord Dracula awakens from his slumber to terrorize the land. Simon Belmont, a descendant of the legendary vampire hunters, must venture into Dracula's castle to defeat the evil lord and save the world from eternal darkness. Armed with the magical Vampire Killer whip, Simon battles through hordes of monsters and formidable bosses to reach the heart of the castle.
key_features: Side-scrolling platforming with precise jumping mechanics
Weapon variety including whip, axe, cross, and holy water
Item-based combat system requiring strategic inventory management
Non-linear level design with hidden rooms and secret passages
Boss battles against iconic monsters like Frankenstein and Medusa
Time limit mechanic requiring speed and efficiency
High difficulty curve requiring memorization of enemy patterns
Iconic soundtrack composed by Michiru Yamane and others
legacy_and_impact: Castlevania established the template for the action-platformer genre and spawned one of the longest-running video game franchises in history. Its gothic aesthetic and challenging gameplay influenced countless titles, including Metroid and Contra. The game remains a cultural touchstone for retro gaming enthusiasts.
